hero.headline: Koyon AI da ke Daidaitawa ga Kowane Ɗalibi
hero.subheadline: Ba a Bar Ɗalibi Daya a Baya Ba. Ilimi na musamman da fasahar Brain Clone AI ke ba da karfi wanda ke ƙirƙira bayanan koyo na musamman ga kowane ɗalibi.
hero.slide2Headline: Hanyoyi Na Musamman ga Kowane Mai Koyo
hero.slide2Subheadline: AI dinmu na daidaitawa a lokaci guda, yana gano ƙarfi da giɓi don ƙirƙira tsarin karatu na musamman da ke sa ɗalibai su ci gaba.
hero.slide3Headline: An Yi shi don Đalibai IEP, Đalibai Duka Suna Son shi
hero.slide3Subheadline: Ko ɗanka yana da IEP, tsarin 504, ko kawai yana bukata ƙarin tallafi, Brain Clone AI na Aivo yana gina ƙwarewar koyo wanda ya bambanta kamar su.
hero.slide4Headline: Malamai 5 na AI Ƙwararru, Tafiya Guda Đaya ta Musamman
hero.slide4Subheadline: Daga lissafi zuwa fahimtar karatu, malaman AI na musamman namu suna saduwa da ɗalibai inda suke kuma suna jagorantar su da haƙuri, ƙarfafa gwiwa da hankali mai daidaitawa.
hero.slide5Headline: Bi Ci Gaba a Lokaci Guda
hero.slide5Subheadline: Dashboard mai kyau na koyo wanda ke ba ɗalibai, iyaye, da malamai ganin nan take na ci gaba, jerin nasarori, da shawarwarin AI.

features.title: Duk Abin da Ɗalibanka Ke Bukata don Cin Nasara
features.subtitle: AIVO na haɗa AI na zamani da ilimin kimiyyar koyarwa da aka tabbatar don ƙirƙira ƙwarewar koyo da ke daidaitawa ga kowane ɗalibi.
features.brainCloneDesc: AI ɗinmu na musamman yana ƙirƙirar tagwaye na dijital na bayanan koyon kowane ɗalibi, yana daidaitawa a lokacin gaske don dacewa da ƙarfi, giɓi da salon koyon su.
features.adaptiveDesc: Ana ƙirƙirar kowane darasi, jarrabawa da aikin yi ta hanyar da ta dace don dacewa da matakin ɗalibin a yanzu da manufofin IEP. Babu hanyoyin koyo guda biyu da suke kamanceceniya.
features.iepDesc: Ɗora takardu na IEP da ke akwai kuma ka ga yadda AIVO ke daidaita manhaja, sauye-sauye da bin diddigin ci gaba ta atomatik zuwa tsarin kowane ɗalibi.
features.tutorsDesc: Malamai AI biyar na musamman: Nova, Sage, Spark, Chrono da Pixel kowannensu yana da hali da salon koyarwa na musamman a kowane fanni.
features.homeworkDesc: Ɗalibai za su iya ɗaukar hoton kowane aiki su sami jagora mataki-mataki (ba amsoshi ba) wanda ke gina fahimta ta gaske da ƙwarewar warware matsala.
features.gamificationDesc: Maki XP, jerin ayyuka, badges da kwallon masu jagoranci suna sa ɗalibai su kasance masu kishin koyo. Iyaye da malamai za su iya ganin ma'aunin shiga a dashbod na lokacin gaske.

howItWorks.title: Yadda AIVO Yake Aiki
howItWorks.subtitle: Matakai uku masu sauƙi don koyon musamman da ke daidaitawa ga buƙatun musamman na kowane ɗalibi.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Kammala gwajin koyo na sauri kuma ɗora IEP ɗinka idan kana da ɗaya. AIVO tana gina fahimta cikakkiya ta yadda kake koyo mafi kyau.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI ɗinmu tana ƙirƙirar tagwaye na dijital na bayananku na koyo. Tana sanin ƙarfinku, tana gano giɓi kuma tana keɓance kowane abun ciki don kai kawai.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Nutsa cikin darussa masu daidaitawa, yi magana da malamai AI, kammala ayyuka kuma bi diddigin ci gabanka. Brain Clone ɗinka yana girma tare da kai, yana ƙara wayo a kowane zama.

aiTutors.title: Sadu da Ƙungiyar Koyon AI Naka
aiTutors.subtitle: Malamai na AI guda biyar masu ƙwarewa, kowane ɗaya da halin kansa da salon koyarwa na musamman da aka ƙera don sa kowane fanni ya zama mai ban sha'awa.
aiTutors.novaPersonality: Mai binciken sararin samaniya wanda ke canza lissafi zuwa tafiya tsakanin taurari. Nova tana sa algebra ta ji kamar kewaya taswirorin taurari kuma geometry kamar tsara jirgin sama.
aiTutors.sagePersonality: Gwanin mai ba da labari wanda ke rayar da adabi. Sage tana canza fahimtar karatu zuwa aikin bincike kuma rubutu zuwa gina duniyoyi.
aiTutors.sparkPersonality: Mai ƙirƙira mai ƙwazo wanda ke sa gwaje-gwajen kimiyya su ji kamar sihiri. Spark tana canza kowane zato zuwa aikin ganowa mai ban sha'awa.
aiTutors.chronoPersonality: Jagoran matafiyi na lokaci wanda ke sa tarihi ta ji kamar tafiya ta sirri. Chrono tana ɗaukar ɗalibai zuwa tsofaffin wayewar kai da muhimman lokuta.
aiTutors.pixelPersonality: Abokin shirya kwamfuta mai kyau wanda ke sa shirya koodu ya ji kamar gina da LEGO na dijital. Pixel tana canza gyara kurakurai zuwa warware matsaloli kuma algorithms zuwa tsara wasanni.

socialProof.badge: Đalibai sama da 150 suna amincewa da mu a cikin shirye-shiryen gwaji a faɗin ƙasar

audienceTabs.title: An Yi shi don Kowa a Ilimi
audienceTabs.subtitle: Ko kai iyaye ne, malami, ko mai kula da gunduma, AIVO yana da kayan aikin da kake bukata.
audienceTabs.parentsSubheadline: AIVO yana ƙirƙirar abokin koyon da ya dace wanda ke daidaitawa don buƙatun musamman na ɗanku, ko suna da IEP, hazaka ko kuma suna koyo ta hanya dabam.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit1Desc: Brain Clone AI yana gina bayanan koyo na musamman, yana daidaita kowane darasi don saurin, salon da abubuwan da ɗanku ke so.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit2Desc: Ya bi FERPA da COPPA. An ɓoye bayanan ɗanku, ba a taɓa sayar da su ba, kuma kai ne ke sarrafa abin da ake raba.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit3Title: Bin Diddigin Ci Gaba Na Gaske
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit3Desc: Ga ainihin abin da ɗanku ke koyo, inda suke yi kyau da inda suke buƙatar taimako-ana sabunta a lokacin gaske.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit4Desc: Manhajan wayar hannu tana aiki ba tare da intanet ba, ma'ana koyo yana ci gaba a tafiye-tafiye, ɗakin jira ko gidan kakanni.
audienceTabs.parentsStep1Desc: Amsa tambayoyi kaɗan game da shekarun yara, ajinsu, abubuwan da suke so da buƙatun koyonsu. Ɗora IEP idan suna da ɗaya.
audienceTabs.parentsStep2Desc: Ana haɗa ɗanku da malamai AI da suke dacewa da halinsu. Nova don lissafi, Sage don karatu, Spark don kimiyya da sauransu.
audienceTabs.parentsStep3Desc: Bi diddigin ci gaba a dashbod na iyaye. Ga ƙwarewar da aka mallaka, lokacin da aka yi amfani da shi don koyo da wuraren ci gaba.
audienceTabs.parentsTestimonialQuote: Ɗana yana da ADHD kuma yana fama a makarantar gargajiya. Da AIVO, yana roƙon yin darussa. Malamai AI suna sa shi shiga ta hanyar da littattafansa ba su taɓa iya ba.
audienceTabs.parentsTestimonialRole: Mahaifinku Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, Dallas
audienceTabs.teachersSubheadline: AIVO yana kula da bambanci, bin diddigin ci gaba da bin diddigin IEP don ku mayar da hankali kan abin da ya fi muhimmanci: haɗuwa da ɗaliban ku.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit1Title: Awa 6+ Da Aka Ajiye A Kowane Mako
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit1Desc: Bambancin darasi na atomatik, rahoton ci gaba da takardun IEP suna 'yantar da mafi muhimmancin albarkatunka-lokaci.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit2Desc: Ga ci gaban kowane ɗalibi a kallo ɗaya. Gano wanda ke buƙatar shiga kafin su makale.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit3Desc: Ɗora IEP kuma AIVO ta daidaita abun ciki ta atomatik, bi diddigin manufofi ta kuma samar da rahoton ci gaba masu bin doka.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit4Title: Bambanci Ba Tare Da Wahala Ba
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit4Desc: Darasi ɗaya, siga 30. AIVO tana daidaita abun ciki ta atomatik don kowane ɗalibi a ajinku.
audienceTabs.teachersStep1Desc: Shigo da jerin sunayen ku daga Clever ko ClassLink. Ɗora IEP kuma kafa manufofin koyo don kowane ɗalibi.
audienceTabs.teachersStep2Desc: Ƙirƙiri ayyukan da ke bambanta ta atomatik don kowane ɗalibi. AIVO tana daidaita wahala, taimako da tsari.
audienceTabs.teachersStep3Desc: Bi diddigin ci gaba a lokacin gaske. Samar da rahoton IEP, sabuntawa ga iyaye da shawarwarin shiga.
audienceTabs.teachersTestimonialQuote: Ina da ɗalibai 28 da IEP 8 daban-daban. AIVO tana ba ni damar bambantawa ga kowannensu ba tare da aiki har tsakar dare ba. Ita ce kayan aikin da na jira shekaru 15.
audienceTabs.teachersTestimonialRole: Malamin Ilimi Na Musamman Da Aka Tabbatar, Chicago
audienceTabs.districtsHeadline: Yaɗa Koyon Keɓantacce A Duk Gundumar
audienceTabs.districtsSubheadline: AIVO tana ba da kayan aikin koyon AI na matakin kasuwanci tare da bin FERPA, haɗin SIS da binciken gundumar.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit1Desc: Haɗin kai tare da Clever da ClassLink. Daidaitawar jerin sunaye ta atomatik, shigar guda ɗaya da canja wurin maki.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit2Desc: SOC 2 Type II da aka tabbatar. An ɓoye bayanan ɗalibai a wurin hutawa da yawo. Bincike na shekara-shekara na waje.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit3Desc: Bi diddigin aiki a tsakanin makarantu, ajujuwa da ƙididdiga. Gano bambance-bambance kuma auna tasirin shiga.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit4Desc: Ƙwararru na aiwatarwa, horon ƙwararru da tallafin fasaha 24/7 ga ƙungiyarku.
audienceTabs.districtsStep1Desc: Fara da gwajin kwanaki 30 a ajujuwan da aka zaɓa. Muna kula da saiti, horo kuma muna ba da manajan nasara da aka keɓe.
audienceTabs.districtsStep2Desc: Bincika bayanan gwaji: ma'aunin shiga, ribar koyo, gamsuwar malamai da ingantawar bin IEP.
audienceTabs.districtsStep3Desc: Aiwatar a duk makarantu tare da haɗin SIS, manufofin da aka keɓe da dashbod na gudanar da gundumar.
audienceTabs.districtsTestimonialQuote: Mun gwada AIVO a ajujuwa 12 mun ga ingantawa 31% a makin karatu don ɗaliban IEP. Yanzu muna yaɗawa zuwa duk gundumar.
audienceTabs.districtsTestimonialRole: Mai Gudanar Gundumar Da Aka Tabbatar, Minneapolis

statsBand.hoursSaved: Awannin da aka tanada ga malami/mako

testimonials.title: Abin da Mutane Ke Cewa
testimonials.quote1: Ɗana yana da ADHD kuma yana fama a makarantar gargajiya. Da AIVO, yana roƙon yin darussa. Malamai AI suna sa shi shiga ta hanyar da littattafansa ba su taɓa iya ba.
testimonials.role1: Mahaifinku Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, Washington DC
testimonials.quote2: Ina da ɗalibai 28 da IEP 8 daban-daban. AIVO tana ba ni damar bambantawa ga kowannensu ba tare da aiki har tsakar dare ba. Ita ce kayan aikin da na jira shekaru 15.
testimonials.role2: Malamin Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, Chicago
testimonials.quote3: Mun gwada AIVO a ajujuwa 12 mun ga ingantawa 31% a makin karatu don ɗaliban IEP. Yanzu muna yaɗawa zuwa duk gundumar.
testimonials.role3: Mai Gudanar Gundumar Da Aka Tabbatar, Minneapolis
testimonials.quote4: Brain Clone AI abin mamaki ne. Ya gano cewa ɗiyata tana koyon lissafi da kyau ta hanyar samfurori na gani a zaman biyu kawai. Kwarin gwiwar ta ya ƙaru.
testimonials.role4: Mahaifinku Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, Dallas
testimonials.quote5: Bin diddigin IEP na AIVO yana adana awowi a kowane mako. Rahoton ci gaba da suke ɗaukar duk ƙarshen mako yanzu ana ƙirƙira su ta atomatik da bayanan da za a iya dogara da su.
testimonials.name5: Mai Daidaitawa Na Ilimi Na Musamman
testimonials.role5: Malamin Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, San Francisco
testimonials.quote6: A matsayina na mahaifi mai koyar da gida yara uku a matakan daban-daban, Aivo ya canza komai. Kowane yaro yana samun daidai abin da yake buƙata, zan iya bin duk a dashbod ɗaya.
testimonials.name6: Mahaifin Da Ke Koyar Da Gida Na 3 (Aji 2, 5, 8)
testimonials.role6: Mahaifinku Aivo Da Aka Tabbatar, Washington DC
